sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Marcus & Millichap brokers $17.5M Bushwick retail sale
feed.summary: Marcus & Millichap has successfully brokered the $17.5 million sale of a fully-leased, 10-unit experiential retail property located at 321 Starr Street in Bushwick. The sale was arranged by Shaun Riney, Michael Salvatico, Scott Plasky, and Alexander Arustamanian to a Canadian family entering the New York City market. The property, renovated in 2017, features over 7,000 square feet of outdoor rooftop space and tenants like MetroRock, 48 Cypress, and New York Film Lab.

feed.title: Lincoln Educational Services renews executive contracts through 2028
feed.summary: Lincoln Educational Services (NASDAQ:LINC) has renewed the contracts of its five top executives through December 31, 2028, with new base salaries effective January 1, 2026. The company's stock has seen over 60% growth in the past year, and it recently reported strong Q3 2025 results, exceeding earnings and revenue expectations.

feed.title: Ramaco will spend up to $100M buying back its own stock in 2 years
feed.summary: Ramaco Resources announced a Board-authorized share repurchase program of up to $100 million of its Class A common stock, to be executed over 24 months starting December 23, 2025. This opportunistic program will preserve liquidity for its capital development and follows over $600 million in capital raises in the second half of 2025. The company stated this move is a means of returning capital to shareholders and reflects confidence in its operational performance and financial strength.

feed.title: Franklin Resources Inc. Stock Underperforms Tuesday When Compared To Competitors
feed.summary: Franklin Resources Inc.'s stock underperformed on Tuesday compared to its competitors. This article briefly mentions Unity Software's fourth-quarter financial results, including revenue increasing 35% year-over-year to $609 million and a quarterly loss of 66 cents per share.

feed.title: Wedbush Calls Microsoft (MSFT) a Core AI Winner With $625 Price Target
feed.summary: Wedbush has reiterated its "Outperform" rating for Microsoft (MSFT) with a $625 price target, identifying it as a core AI winner. Analyst Dan Ives believes the market is underestimating Microsoft's Azure growth and AI-driven expansion, expecting AI to significantly boost revenue and margins by 2026. Channel checks suggest strong deployment of Azure and Copilot, potentially adding $25 billion to the company's fiscal 2026 revenue.

feed.title: Fused Silica Windows Market Is Going to Boom |• Corning Inc. • Schott AG
feed.summary: Worldwide Market Reports has published a new research study on the Fused Silica Windows Market, projecting substantial growth in the coming years. The report offers a comprehensive analysis including market dynamics, drivers, restraints, challenges, growth opportunities, technological advancements, and a competitive analysis featuring key players like Corning Inc. and Schott AG. It also provides regional insights and forecasts, supported by extensive primary and secondary research, to assist businesses in strategic planning.

feed.title: International Paper’s Strategic Overhaul: A Path to Margin Stability?
feed.summary: International Paper is undergoing a major corporate transformation involving facility closures, a significant acquisition, and portfolio optimization to focus on its core packaging operations. Investors are keenly watching the upcoming financial release on January 29, 2026, for indications that these strategic actions, including the sale of its cellulose fibers business and the DS Smith acquisition, will lead to lasting margin improvement and stabilize North American containerboard shipments. The success of this strategy hinges on effective cost reductions and seamless volume relocation without disruption, which would validate the investment thesis despite elevated debt levels.

feed.title: Red then green: Tractor market leaders through the years
feed.summary: This article traces the history of U.S. tractor market leadership, from International Harvester's dominance in the 1950s to John Deere's subsequent rise through the 1960s and beyond, fueled by technological innovation and a strong dealer network. It also highlights the current landscape, noting John Deere's continued leadership, the consolidation into CNH Industrial and Agco, and the significant growth of Kubota, particularly in the compact tractor segment. The shifting market reflects broader agricultural trends like fewer, larger farms and changing labor demands.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Europe SE reports Avadel Pharmaceuticals dealings By Investing.com
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley Europe SE disclosed its trading in Avadel Pharmaceuticals plc (NASDAQ:AVDL) securities, reporting both a purchase and a sale of 3,791 ordinary shares on December 23, 2025, at $21.5675 per share. Following these transactions, Morgan Stanley held no relevant securities in Avadel Pharmaceuticals. The disclosure complies with Irish regulatory requirements for connected exempt principal traders during takeover periods.

feed.title: Planned Chubb AI overhaul places 20% of jobs at risk
feed.summary: Chubb plans to cut approximately 20% of its global workforce, impacting 8,500 to 9,000 roles, over the next three to four years as part of a major digital transformation focused on AI and automation. This initiative aims to automate 85% of major underwriting and claims processes and generate 85% of global gross written premium digitally, positioning the insurer for an anticipated soft market. The company also projects its private investments to grow from $0.9bn to around $2bn.

feed.title: |13,525 Shares in Fabrinet $FN Acquired by Argent Capital Management LLC
feed.summary: |Argent Capital Management LLC has acquired 13,525 shares of Fabrinet (NYSE:FN), valued at approximately $4.93 million, establishing a new position in the technology company. This comes as analysts have set higher price targets for FN, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating, while company insiders have sold a significant number of shares recently. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their holdings in Fabrinet.

feed.title: article title here
feed.summary: brief 2-3 sentence summary of the article

feed.title: What Corporación América Airports (CAAP)'s Broad-Based November Traffic Growth Means For Shareholders
feed.summary: Corporación América Airports reported significant broad-based traffic growth in November 2025, with passenger volumes and aircraft movements exceeding prior-year levels, particularly in Argentina. This continued growth, following a strong Q3 2025 earnings report, reinforces the company's investment narrative of volume-driven revenue despite market volatility and inflation risks in Argentina. Investors are encouraged to assess how this operational momentum translates into financial performance and to consider diverse fair value estimates.

feed.title: LG Energy Solution says unit to sell $2.86 billion US joint factory assets to Honda unit
feed.summary: LG Energy Solution announced that its unit would sell a factory building and assets in Ohio, valued at $2.86 billion, to Honda Development and Manufacturing of America. This deal, which excludes land and equipment, aims to improve joint venture operational efficiency for their $4.4 billion battery plant. Amid slowing EV demand, this follows Ford Motor's termination of an EV battery supply deal with LGES and SK On ending its joint venture with Ford.

feed.title: Plant Growth Regulators (PGR) Market to Reach US$ 6,028.40 million by 2032 | Strong 7.2% CAGR | North America Leads with 30% Share | Key Players: BASF SE, Corteva, Syngenta, Dhanuka Agritech, Bayer
feed.summary: The global Plant Growth Regulators (PGR) Market is projected to grow from US$ 3,456.56 million in 2024 to US$ 6,028.40 million by 2032, exhibiting a CAGR of 7.2%. This growth is driven by the ability of PGRs to enhance crop productivity and quality, with North America leading the market and Asia-Pacific showing the fastest growth. Key players include BASF SE, Corteva, Syngenta, Dhanuka Agritech, and Bayer, who are actively engaged in new product launches, partnerships, and acquisitions to strengthen their market positions.

feed.title: APA Corporation (NASDAQ:APA) Given Consensus Rating of "Hold" by Brokerages
feed.summary: APA Corporation has received a consensus "Hold" rating from 25 brokerages with an average 12-month price target of $26.73. The company recently beat its last-quarter EPS estimates and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.25, while institutional investors own approximately 83% of the stock. Several hedge funds have also adjusted their positions in APA, with many increasing their holdings.

feed.title: SLK, an Altimetrik Company named Major Contender in Everest Group's Application Transformation Services for AI-enablement PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2025
feed.summary: SLK, an Altimetrik Company, has been recognized as a Major Contender in Everest Group's Application Transformation Services for AI-enablement PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2025, highlighting its AI-first vision. This recognition underscores their ability to help enterprises build intelligent, adaptive, and data-driven ecosystems ready for the AI era by modernizing legacy systems into cloud-native, data-rich, API-first architectures. SLK's approach combines AI-infused and AI-native transformation, leveraging proprietary tools and domain expertise to drive AI adoption at scale across various industries.

feed.title: Global investors take over Ebisu developer behind Yebisu Garden Place
feed.summary: PAG, a leading Asia-based alternative investment firm, and KKR, a global investment firm, have partnered to acquire 100% of Sapporo Real Estate Co., Ltd. from Sapporo Holdings. This acquisition will occur in stages over three years, with the initial 51% stake closing on June 1, 2026. Sapporo Holdings will use the proceeds to strengthen its alcoholic beverages business, while PAG and KKR will leverage their expertise to enhance Sapporo Real Estate's portfolio, including landmark projects like Yebisu Garden Place.

feed.title: DTE Energy Company (NYSE:DTE) Receives Average Rating of "Moderate Buy" from Brokerages
feed.summary: DTE Energy Company (NYSE:DTE) has received a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from thirteen analysts, with an average 12-month price target of $148.00. This follows strong Q3 results, beating EPS and revenue expectations, and an increase in the quarterly dividend to $1.165, yielding approximately 3.6%. Analysts revised price targets and ratings, with some positive adjustments despite a slight overall reduction in the average target, reflecting confidence in the utility provider's performance and outlook.

feed.title: The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) Given Average Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Analysts
feed.summary: Analysts have assigned The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) an average "Moderate Buy" rating, with a 12-month average price target of $233.17 based on 26 coverages. Recent positive developments for Boeing include a $2 billion Pentagon order, a sole-source C-17 award, and the acquisition of Spirit AeroSystems, alongside a "Buy" initiation from Citi. However, the company faces scrutiny after a large EPS miss and criticism from a NASA safety panel regarding program execution and reputational risks.

feed.title: Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE:TPR) Given Average Rating of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE:TPR) has received an average "Moderate Buy" rating from 21 brokerages, with an average 12-month price target of $122. The company recently surpassed quarterly earnings estimates, achieving $1.38 EPS against an expected $1.25, and reported revenues of $1.70 billion, a 13.1% year-over-year increase. Tapestry also announced a $1.0 billion share buyback program and a quarterly dividend of $0.40, while insiders have recently sold approximately $12 million worth of stock.

feed.title: AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) Receives Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" from Analysts
feed.summary: AT&T Inc. has received a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from 26 analysts, with an average 1-year target price of $30.24. The company trades near $24.47, offers a 4.5% dividend yield, and recently reported quarterly EPS of $0.54, meeting analyst expectations. Major firms like Morgan Stanley and Goldman Sachs have adjusted their price targets for AT&T.

feed.title: Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) Given Average Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Analysts
feed.summary: Analysts have issued a "Moderate Buy" rating for Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF), with an average 1-year price target of $83.33 among 23 firms. The company has demonstrated strong financial performance, beating quarterly EPS estimates and maintaining high profitability, while also announcing a $1.00 billion share buyback program. Despite some insider selling, institutional investors have increased their holdings, reinforcing confidence in the stock.

feed.title: Global investor KKR backs Japan firm developing skilled engineers
feed.summary: KKR has completed its tender offer for 55.89% of Forum Engineering Inc., a Japanese firm focused on developing skilled engineering talent. Following this, Forum Engineering will conduct a self-tender during which a major shareholder will tender its stake, enabling KKR to pursue full ownership through a share consolidation process. KKR plans to enhance training, implement an employee ownership program, and leverage its global experience to support Forum Engineering's growth and impact.

feed.title: Solidcore’s ESG management system highly rated by S&P Global
feed.summary: Solidcore Resources plc has been highly rated by the S&P Global Corporate Sustainability Assessment 2025, ranking in the top 10% of global mining companies and the top 5% for environmental management. The company, a leading gold producer in Kazakhstan, also achieved the highest ESG ranking among mining and metallurgical companies in Kazakhstan and received an "A" rating from PwC for sustainability reporting. This recognition highlights Solidcore's strong commitment to environmental, social, and governance practices.

feed.title: Insulin Delivery Devices Market Outlook: Market to Reach US$ 43.11 Billion by 2033 at 8.8% CAGR; North America Leads with 42% Share; Key Players Include Medtronic, Insulet, and Tandem Diabetes Care
feed.summary: The global Insulin Delivery Devices Market, valued at US$ 20.26 billion in 2024, is projected to reach US$ 43.11 billion by 2033, demonstrating an 8.8% CAGR, driven by the increasing prevalence of diabetes and technological advancements. North America currently dominates the market with a 42% share, attributed to high diabetes prevalence and robust healthcare spending. Key players like Medtronic, Insulet, and Tandem Diabetes Care are leading innovations in patient-centric and minimally invasive solutions.

feed.title: YouTube beats Netflix, Amazon Prime, Disney in viewership; and tells you why this Google company is being named in fight between two of the biggest American companies
feed.summary: Google-owned YouTube has surpassed streaming giants like Netflix, Amazon Prime Video, and Disney+ in American viewership, according to Nielsen data. This dominance has led to YouTube being a key factor in the intense battle between Netflix and Paramount for Warner Bros. entertainment properties, with both companies aiming to acquire content to better compete with YouTube's growing influence.

feed.title: Kratos Defense & Security Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ:KTOS) Receives Average Rating of "Moderate Buy" from Analysts
feed.summary: Kratos Defense & Security Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ:KTOS) has an average "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts, with a consensus one-year price target of $82.53. Despite strong financial performance in the last quarter, insiders have sold a significant amount of shares, and the stock is trading at a high P/E ratio. The company specializes in national security and defense solutions, including unmanned systems and missile defense.

feed.title: Inspire Medical Systems, Inc. (INSP) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz announced that shareholders of Inspire Medical Systems, Inc. (INSP) who incurred losses have an opportunity to lead a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Inspire Medical Systems made materially misleading statements between August 6, 2024, and August 4, 2025, regarding the poor demand for Inspire V, incomplete customer training, and issues with IT systems and insurance claims processing. Investors are encouraged to contact the law firm by January 5, 2026, to participate in the lawsuit.

feed.title: Lemonade is the best performing property and casualty insurance stock YTD (LMND:NYSE)
feed.summary: Lemonade (LMND) has emerged as the best-performing property and casualty insurance stock year-to-date, with the S&P 500 financials sector keeping pace with the broader market. Other top performers in the sector include HCI Group (HCI) and Hamilton Insurance Group (HG). HCI Group, Hamilton Insurance Group, The Hartford Insurance Group (HIG), and Mercury General (MCY) all received 'Strong Buy' Quant ratings.

feed.title: ICL Signs 2026 Potash Supply Contracts With Chinese Customers
feed.summary: ICL Group Ltd. has secured contracts to supply 750,000 metric tons of potash to China in 2026, with an option for an additional 330,000 metric tons, priced at $348 per ton CIFFO. These agreements strengthen ICL's presence in the Chinese fertilizer market. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates ICL as "Neutral" due to mixed financial performance and bearish technical indicators despite positive guidance.

feed.title: Why Marqeta (MQ) Stock Is Down Today
feed.summary: Marqeta (NASDAQ:MQ) shares fell 2.4% after a regulatory filing revealed that Director and 10% owner Jason M. Gardner sold over 218,000 shares. This insider sale is interpreted by investors as a potential lack of confidence in the company's short-term prospects, leading to selling pressure. Despite this, Marqeta has shown volatility but also provided an optimistic outlook recently, projecting Adjusted EBITDA to more than triple and GAAP profitability by 2026, alongside a new $100 million share buyback program.

feed.title: Helix Energy Solutions awarded multi-year North Sea plug & abandonment contract
feed.summary: Helix Energy Solutions has secured a multi-year contract for riserless plug and abandonment (P&A) operations on up to 34 subsea wells in the U.K. North Sea. The scope of work, commencing in 2026, includes flushing and disconnection of pipelines alongside well P&A. Helix will utilize its owned assets, such as the Well Enhancer or Seawell vessels, and provide project management and engineering services for a fully integrated solution.

feed.title: State Street Private-Credit ETFs Outshine Peers — A New Era for Liquid Alts?
feed.summary: State Street’s new SPDR Private & Public Credit ETFs, which blend public bonds and capped private credit instruments, have significantly outperformed most fixed-income ETF peers, achieving higher returns. This success highlights a growing interest in liquid alternative credit options despite initial investor caution regarding private credit illiquidity. The performance puts pressure on other ETF issuers to develop similar hybrid vehicles bridging liquid and private investment exposures.

feed.title: NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NEE) Given Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Analysts
feed.summary: NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NEE) has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from twenty analysts, with an average 12-month price target of $91.56. Despite significant insider selling totaling approximately $13.15 million in the past 90 days, largely from CEO Armando Pimentel, Jr., the company reported mixed Q3 results with EPS beating estimates but revenue slightly missing. Institutional investors hold 78.72% of the company's stock, and NextEra also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.5665 per share.

feed.title: EPDM Rubber Market Outlook: Market to Reach US$ 5.3 Billion
feed.summary: The EPDM Rubber Market is projected to grow from US$ 3.3 billion in 2023 to US$ 5.3 billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 6.3%. This growth is primarily driven by increasing demand from the construction and automotive industries due to EPDM's resistance to heat, ozone, and UV radiation. Europe is a significant hub for EPDM rubber production and consumption, with key players including Dow Inc., Exxon Mobil, and SABIC.

feed.title: Is Ameriprise Financial Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
feed.summary: Insufficient information to create a summary. The article content is missing.

feed.title: Trump Media shuffles Bitcoin holdings after crossing $1 billion mark, stash may have slipped below 10K BTC
feed.summary: This article discusses how Trump Media has shuffled its Bitcoin holdings, which previously exceeded $1 billion. This shuffling might have resulted in their Bitcoin stash falling below 10,000 BTC.

feed.title: Sands China Renews Shared Services Pact With Las Vegas Sands Through 2028
feed.summary: Sands China has renewed its shared services agreement with its controlling shareholder, Las Vegas Sands, extending the pact from 2026 to 2028. This agreement covers marketing, transportation, and other related services, ensuring continued operational support. The transactions are classified as continuing connected transactions under Hong Kong's Listing Rules, requiring reporting and annual review, but are exempt from independent shareholder approval.

feed.title: Grocery stores open on Christmas Eve: Walmart, Kroger, Costco, Sam's Club, and more
feed.summary: This article details the operating hours for major US grocery stores like Walmart, Kroger, Costco, and Sam's Club on Christmas Eve 2025, providing essential information for last-minute shoppers. While most stores will be open, many will close earlier than usual, with specific times varying by retailer and location. Walmart, for instance, will operate from 6 AM to 6 PM, and most Krogers will close between 6 PM and 8 PM.

feed.title: Japan's Eneos leads bids for Chevron’s Singapore oil refinery stake, Bloomberg News reports
feed.summary: Japan's top oil refiner, Eneos, is reportedly leading bids for Chevron's stake in a Singapore refinery, with a deal nearing completion despite potential delays. The refinery, valued at about $1 billion, had also drawn interest from global commodities traders Vitol and Glencore for a 50% stake. Reuters could not immediately verify the report, and Eneos and Chevron did not respond to requests for comment.

feed.title: CooperCompanies Appoints Walter M. Rosebrough, Jr. to its Board of Directors
feed.summary: CooperCompanies has appointed Walter M. Rosebrough, Jr. as an independent director, effective January 3, 2026, stemming from a cooperation agreement with investment firm Browning West, LP. Rosebrough, CEO emeritus of STERIS plc, will join the board's corporate governance and nominating committee, with serious consideration for him to become chair by the end of 2026. This move follows Browning West's criticism of Cooper's "underperformance" and desire for board-level change to optimize the business and enhance shareholder value.

feed.title: LogProstyle Expands Hotel Portfolio In Tokyo As Tourism Growth Continues
feed.summary: LogProstyle Inc. reported its fiscal results for the first half of FY2026, showcasing strong growth in its hospitality division despite a modest overall revenue decline. The company's hotel revenue increased by 10.7%, driven by higher occupancy rates and average daily rates, fueled by Japan's booming inbound tourism. LogProstyle is expanding its hotel portfolio, with a new property in Tokyo's Asakusa district slated to open in 2028, underscoring its commitment to sustainable growth in the Japanese tourism market.

feed.title: Form 424B2 BARCLAYS BANK PLC
feed.summary: This SEC Form 424B2 filing by Barclays Bank PLC details an offering of $275,000 Barrier Digital Notes due December 27, 2027, linked to the performance of the Nasdaq-100, Russell 2000, and S&P 500 Indexes. These notes do not pay interest and do not guarantee the return of the full principal, with investors facing potential significant losses if the least performing underlier falls below its barrier value. The document outlines key terms, risks, tax considerations, and the bank's U.K. Bail-in Power.

feed.title: Nova Minerals Raises $22.34 Million in U.S. ADS Offering After Partial Over-Allotment Exercise
feed.summary: Nova Minerals (NVA) successfully completed a U.S. ADS offering, initially raising approximately $20 million. A partial over-allotment exercise brought the total gross proceeds from the offering to about $22.34 million. This move strengthens Nova Minerals' capital position and expands its investor base in the U.S.

feed.title: Blue Ridge Bankshares Gains 33.7% in 6 Months: How to Play the Stock?
feed.summary: Blue Ridge Bankshares (BRBS) has seen significant gains of 33.7% over the past six months, outperforming its industry and the S&P 500, driven by the termination of a Consent Order and strong Q3 2025 results. The company has also de-risked its balance sheet by exiting fintech/BaaS-related deposits and focusing on traditional community banking. While its fundamentals are strong, the stock's valuation at a premium suggests future upside depends on continued operational execution and growth.

feed.title: When is Target open on Christmas Eve 2025? See store hours
feed.summary: Target stores will be open from 7 a.m. to 8 p.m. on Christmas Eve 2025, but will be closed on Christmas Day. The article provides a comprehensive list of Christmas Eve hours for various grocery and retail stores, including Walmart, Costco, Kroger, Kohl's, and Home Depot, for last-minute holiday shopping needs.

feed.title: Axon Enterprise Inc. Stock Underperforms Tuesday When Compared To Competitors
feed.summary: Axon Enterprise Inc. stock underperformed on Tuesday. This news follows Unity Software's fourth-quarter financial results, which reported a revenue increase of 35% year-over-year to $609 million, exceeding estimates, despite a quarterly loss of 66 cents per share. The article highlights Axon's performance in the context of competitor reporting.

feed.title: Brown & Brown (BRO) Downgraded to Market Perform Amid Growth Con
feed.summary: Brown & Brown (BRO) has been downgraded to Market Perform due to anticipated weaker organic growth, with an analyst revising 2026 and 2027 growth forecasts downwards. While the company demonstrates strong profitability and its valuation suggests potential opportunities near historical lows, it faces financial distress risks indicated by its Altman Z-Score. Investors should conduct thorough due diligence, weighing the robust financial performance against the growth concerns and leverage levels.

feed.title: Newmont (NEM) Stock After the Bell on Dec. 23, 2025: After‑Hours Update, Gold’s $4,500 Breakout, Analyst Forecasts, and What to Know Before Wednesday’s Open
feed.summary: Newmont (NEM) closed Tuesday's session near fresh highs at $105.25 and remained stable post-market. The stock's performance is primarily driven by gold's breakout above $4,500, fueled by Federal Reserve rate-cut expectations, a weaker U.S. dollar, and geopolitical uncertainties. Investors should be aware of the holiday-shortened trading session on Christmas Eve, which can amplify market moves, and monitor gold prices, dollar fluctuations, and economic data for potential impacts on NEM.
